node.text: <font size="32">香港动植物公园</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong </font>
<font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3">Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens</font>
中西区本地人推荐的景点榜第6名
可以带小孩去玩，很舒服的地方
<font size="32">香港动植物公园(东门)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens (East Gate)</font>
雅宾利道与上亚厘毕道交叉口东南60米
<font size="32">香港动植物公园(西1门)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens (West Gate 1)</font>
雅宾利道与罗便臣道交叉口东60米
<font size="32">香港动植物公园(东1门)</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens (East Gate 1)</font>
雅宾利道与罗便臣道交叉口东北100米

node.content-desc: 爱护动物协会湾仔中心

node.text: <font size="32">爱护<font color='@Color_Text_Brand'>动物</font>协会湾仔中心</font><font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3"> </font>
<font size="22px" color="@Color_Text_L3">Society For The Prevention of Cruelty To Animals Hong Kong Trustees Inc. WaanZai ZungSam</font>

node.content-desc: 搜索框，160路(火车站南广场--动物园)
